channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Instrument LLMs: Track what breaks before users do
item.description: Cut AI pipeline failures 90% with 5 key metrics — Redis caching, token limits, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry traces, and alert thresholds that actually catch issues before users do.

item.title: From $3k to $12k: how I re-rated my salary
item.description: earned 20–30% above the median, but I didn’ with 12k re-rated salary — solve) In 2023, my net monthly salary in Nairobi wa.

item.title: Portfolio trap: 99% of remote devs get it wrong
item.description: Portfolio trap: 99% of remote devs get it wrong — learn the 2026 hiring signals that actually matter and skip the polished-demo trap with real failure artifacts and load tests.

item.title: 32% less cloud carbon, same API speed
item.description: Cut AWS cloud carbon 32% per request without increasing p95 latency above 80 ms — payload pruning, Node.js JIT, and Graviton3 flags that saved $620/month.

item.title: Avoid edge hype: where Workers and Edge pay off
item.description: Cut API response time 75% with Cloudflare Workers in 2026 — real latency, cold start, and cost numbers from a 2.1M-rpd production system, plus when Vercel Edge Functions actually save money.

item.title: AI won’t read your codebase: here’s why
item.description: Cut AI refactor mistakes 31% by exposing your dependency graph — static and runtime graphs, token costs, and the concrete tools that make AI understand your architecture.

item.title: Build backend for 5G users: latency traps revealed
item.description: Cut API response time 60% under 5G tower handovers with dynamic Redis pools — latency traps, pool sizing, and cost savings you missed

item.title: That $50k over-engineering bill we paid
item.description: Cut AWS costs 93% and latency 83% by removing Kafka, gRPC, and event sourcing. The real cost of over-engineering in 2026 — with concrete numbers, benchmarks, and code.

item.title: No CS degree? Good. Here's what actually works.
item.description: Cut promotion time 50% without a CS degree — focus on reliability, observability, and cost control, not credentials or LeetCode. Proven examples from real systems.

item.title: GitHub Copilot cuts review time 40% — here’s how
item.description: GitHub Copilot cuts review: eviews 30–40% faster and juniors were still. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: AI systems: the boring patterns that don’t melt
item.description: ions from 2% to 18%. Reverting required a with AI systems boring patterns — a reliable product.

item.title: From $30k to $150k: 5 moves that changed everything
item.description: Earned $150k gross in 18 months after leaving a $30k Nairobi salary — the contract-to-hire pipeline, productized services, and niche specialization that made it possible.

item.title: AI-coded products: how non-traditional devs shipped real code
item.description: Cut first-month AWS bills 40% with AI-generated stacks — real latency, cost, and chaos-test results from 10 tools tested by a solo founder in 2026.

item.title: Message queues: the 80% rule you need
item.description: Cut API bottleneck 70% with message queues — real latency, cost, and failure data from 2026 systems. Learn when to queue and when to dump the queue entirely.

item.title: Show GitHub alone won’t land you a remote job
item.description: Portfolio beats pedigree for remote jobs — cut rejection rates with incident reports, load tests, and postmortems from real 2026 systems. Proven artifacts that get you hired.

item.title: Why MCP servers power real AI apps
item.description: Cut LLM costs 63% with MCP servers — real latency, Redis caching, and the mistakes teams repeat

item.title: Compare WebSockets, SSE, and polling in practice
item.description: Cut cloud costs 75% with SSE instead of WebSocket — latency, CPU, and $/month numbers from 10 k users on a $12 droplet in 2026

item.title: Repository AI: when context gets real
item.description: Repository AI cuts review cycles 35% by feeding LLMs the whole code graph instead of one file at a time. Learn the toolchain, benchmarks, and the one setup that works in a weekend.

item.title: Fix database pools: common timeout flaw
item.description: Optimize database connection pooling settings to cut costs and boost performance. Learn why small pools and longer timeouts outperform outdated advice.

item.title: 5 ways RAG pipelines collapse in prod
item.description: Cut RAG latency 75% and AWS costs 69% with Postgres + Redis + coalescing — the hidden layers most tutorials skip. 450 ms median latency, $2,100/month bill.
